source.name: User distilled premium web UI prompt set
source.license_notes: Rules distilled from user-provided prompts for personal knowledge base use. Do not copy external media assets directly.

layout_rules: Use a varied sequence such as Hero, Logo Cloud, How It Works, Capabilities, Feature Chess, Feature Grid, Stats, Testimonials, CTA Footer, Portfolio Bento, Journal, or Parallax Gallery.
Feature rows should alternate text and media, use large headings, keep body copy short, and use glass/rounded/video media containers.
Bento grids should not make every card the same size; use 7/5 and 5/7 columns and mix large and small cards.
Stats should be large numbers with small labels, not table-like rows.
Testimonials should use muted quote text, strong names, white/50 roles, and liquid-glass rounded-2xl p-8 cards.
Logo clouds should use controlled opacity, optionally infinite horizontal slider, and avoid too many logos.
accessibility_notes: Do not overload logo clouds with too many low-contrast marks.
Keep section headings and body copy readable over media backgrounds.
Use responsive stacking for bento and feature rows.
Do not rely on hover-only content for mobile.
Keep testimonials and stats semantically readable.
implementation_hints: Use 7/5 and 5/7 desktop grid columns for bento and feature chess sections.
Use image/video backgrounds with hover overlays in selected bento cards.
Use large number plus small label for stats; consider serif italic or tight sans for premium contrast.
Use liquid-glass rounded-2xl p-8 for dark testimonial cards.
Use white/inverted logos on dark background with opacity control.
Use one primary CTA in the footer and keep copy short.
avoid_when: too many sections with identical centered layout
generic feature grid with no media hierarchy

quality.notes: Distilled from multiple detailed React/Tailwind premium landing page prompts covering glassmorphism, video hero sections, typography, motion, SaaS, portfolio, and editorial layouts.

retrieval.ai_summary: Premium landing page section composition: use varied rhythm across hero, logo cloud, feature chess, bento grid, stats, testimonials, portfolio/journal, parallax gallery, and CTA footer. Avoid identical card grids; mix media, asymmetry, large type, and restrained glass.
